utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each one is fully detailed with coverage descriptions and associated costs (monthly or total). Therefore, all required items are present and properly specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant chose three main policy bundles under the 'PrimeCare Premium Adventure Bundle' brand: one for health (which explicitly includes both physical and mental health), one for property, and one for travel. In the ground-truth data, the closest matching entries are all the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' or 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' or 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan', which share the same brand naming convention and coverage domains. Using these correspondences, we map: 'PrimeCare Premium Adventure Bundle – Health & Mental' to both PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical_health) and PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental_health); 'PrimeCare Premium Adventure Bundle – Property' to PrimeHome Premium Coverage; and 'PrimeCare Premium Adventure Bundle – Travel & Adventure' to PrimeTravel Premium Plan. Their respective ratings are 6, 4, 6, and 6 from the ground-truth dataset. No separate ratings are available for the additional services list, so they are not explicitly mapped.
